samples.title: M/M/1 Single-Server Queue
samples.description: Poisson arrivals, exponential service; util=0.8, Lq=3.2, Wq=4.0, W=5.0.

samples.title: M/M/c Multi-Server Queue (c=2)
samples.description: Two parallel servers, one queue; util=0.75, Lq~1.93 (Erlang-C).

samples.title: Serial Line with Buffers (3 stages)
samples.description: Saturated 3-stage line; throughput set by slowest stage (0.5/unit).

samples.title: Shared Operator (resource contention)
samples.description: Two machines share one operator; combined throughput ~ half of dedicated.

samples.title: Setup / Changeover Time
samples.description: Alternating types force a setup per job; capacity = 1/(proc+setup) = 1/7.

samples.title: Accumulating Conveyor (blocking / back-pressure)
samples.description: Conveyor fills to capacity (5) and blocks; throughput = bottleneck 0.05/unit.

samples.title: AGV Congestion (capacity-1 shared edge)
samples.description: Capacity-1 corridor serializes AGVs; lead time rises vs free flow.

samples.title: Experiment / Optimize Demo
samples.description: Sweep process_time; throughput rises monotonically then saturates at arrival rate.
